word: H4279 - מָחָר - mâchâr - maw-khar' - Time to come

sections.paragraph:
Original: מחר

Transliteration: mâchâr

Phonetic: maw-khar'

BDB Definition:

  1. tomorrow, in time to come, in the future
    1. tomorrow (as the day following the present day)
    2. in future time

Origin: probably from H309

TWOT entry: 1185a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
